calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-05-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gordon Atkinson, Esq. 415-510-2114 of Glick Daniel LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Judge Ulmer hears the matter for Judge Massullo since the matter is uncontested. Counsel is informed of the deficiencies on the proposed order that was submitted by email. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EQUITAS BIO/PHARMA SOLUTIONS, LLC.'S Motion To Seal Complaint.

Plaintiff Equitas' motion to seal is GRANTED. The court concludes that the motion complies with the requirements of CRC 2.550 et seq.

Counsel for Equitas is required to resubmit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 2.550(d) and CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Sep-28-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gordon Atkinson, Esq. of Gluck Daniel LLP, 415.510.2994, appearing for the Plaintiff Equitas Bio/Pharma Solutions, LLC;
John M. Neukom, Esq. of Skadden Arps Slate Meagher & Flom LLP, 650.470.4560, appearing for Non-Party/"Party A";
David C. Hungerford, Esq. of Severson & Werson APC, 415.398.3344, appearing for Defendant Hiscox Insurance Company.

PLAINTIFF EQUITAS BIO/PHARMA SOLUTIONS, LLC'S MOTION TO SEAL COMPLAINT.

Matter called, counsel for the Plaintiff and the Non-Party present ARGUMENT.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court issued the following ruling:

The matter is CONTINUED to September 28, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. The matter is continued to allow time for the filing of a supplemental declaration by Party A's CEO (under seal). The supplemental declaration (redacted version) is to be filed by September 18, 2018. Counsel for the Plaintiff and the Defendant may appear by CourtCall on September 28, 2018.

(Please note: this motion will be heard in Dept. 302 by Judge Anne-Christine Massullo. It will be heard after Judge Richard Ulmer's calendar on September 28, 2018.)

Judge: Anne-Cristine Massullo, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/ACM)
